intent: Convert EVERY layer of the app to hexagonal architecture: domain/app/ui/utils code accesses platform ONLY through ports in src/core/services (the single SDK-touching ring). Document (ADR + ARCHITECTURE.md + src/CLAUDE.md), test (port tests + expanded boundary guard), review (Oscar full), build (clasp), commit + push. Driven by Kermit-orchestrator agent -> Oscar (which dispatches ernie/telly/zoe/cookie/bert) per wave.
scope: src/ui/** (dashboardController, dashboard-api, gmail-addon), src/utils/label-cache.js, src/core/config.js, src/core/cache-service.js, src/core/api-service.js, src/core/gmail-service.js (delete), src/core/services/** (extend adapter ring), tests-local/**, docs (ADR, ARCHITECTURE.md, src/CLAUDE.md), cookie SKILL.md

decisions.api_service: relocate Gemini HTTP into adapter ring (or whitelist w/ ADR)
decisions.gmail_service_legacy: migrate callers to GmailAdapter then DELETE
decisions.enforcement: boundary test + Cookie expand to features+ui+utils+core(excl services)

wave5.notes: boundary scope = features+ui+utils+core-excl-services; cookie SKILL.md updated out-of-repo

wave6.notes: ARCHITECTURE.md written; clasp push deployed (8 adapters incl http+cache, gmail-service gone); git push origin master f40da67..3d29c80
